title: Lead Investment Banker at Star Health Insurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Star Health Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Star Health Insurance in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Star Health Insurance:
Star Health Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance!
